2606.12040.title: A Lightweight Multi-Agent Framework for Automated Concrete Barrier Design
2606.12040.paper_summary: The design of reinforced concrete highway barriers is a safety-critical process that requires strict compliance with regulatory provisions such as the AASHTO-LRFD bridge design guidelines. Current engineering practice relies heavily on manual, iterative, and heuristic calculations to satisfy complex nonlinear material and mechanics constraints. Although Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate strong generative capabilities, their direct application to structural engineering remains limited by hallucination risks and insufficient physical grounding. To address these challenges, this study proposes a novel "generation-evaluation-optimization" closed-loop framework for automated concrete barrier design using the multi-agent orchestration capabilities of AutoGen. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed agentic framework achieves over 98% design accuracy, significantly outperforming standalone general-purpose LLMs. More importantly, the study reveals that design performance is not necessarily correlated with model scale, where an 8B-parameter lightweight model could outperform unconstrained 631B-parameter flagship models. This finding highlights the potential to substantially reduce computational costs while improving the accessibility of AI-assisted engineering tools for industry applications. The source code for the proposed multi-agent design framework is available at the project GitHub repository: https://github.com/MXY820/barrier-design. Keywords: Structural Engineering; Multi-Agent Systems; Large Language Models; Concrete Barrier Design; AutoGen; Design Automation.
2606.12040.paper_summary_zh: 加強混凝土高速公路護欄的設計是一個安全關鍵的過程，需要嚴格遵守如AASHTO-LRFD橋樑設計指南等法規條款。當前的工程實踐在很大程度上依賴手動、迭代和啟發式計算，以滿足複雜的非線性材料和力學約束。儘管大型語言模型（LLMs）展示了強大的生成能力，但其在結構工程中的直接應用仍受到幻覺風險和物理基礎不足的限制。為了應對這些挑戰，本研究提出了一種新穎的“生成-評估-優化”閉環框架，利用AutoGen的多代理協調能力進行自動化混凝土護欄設計。實驗結果表明，所提出的代理框架實現了超過98%的設計準確率，顯著超越獨立的通用LLMs。更重要的是，研究顯示設計性能不一定與模型規模相關，其中一個8B參數的輕量級模型可能超越無限制的631B參數旗艦模型。這一發現突顯了在提高AI輔助工程工具的可及性方面，顯著降低計算成本的潛力。所提出的多代理設計框架的源代碼可在項目GitHub庫中獲得：https://github.com/MXY820/barrier-design。關鍵詞：結構工程；多代理系統；大型語言模型；混凝土護欄設計；AutoGen；設計自動化。
2606.12040.author: Wanting Wang et.al.
2606.12040.authors: Wanting Wang, Xiye Ma, Yuyang He, Minghui Cheng, Ran Cao
